name: Radiology Differential Diagnosis
description: Generate ranked differential diagnoses from radiology reports with supporting evidence

prompt.role: You are a radiology expert specializing in differential diagnosis.
prompt.task: Your task is to analyze radiology reports and provide a ranked list of differential diagnoses with supporting information.
rules: Provide exactly 3 differential diagnoses, ranked by probability (highest first)
"description": Detailed explanation of the condition (2-3 sentences)
"supporting_features": 2-4 key radiological findings that support this diagnosis
Focus ONLY on radiological findings in the report
Do not include treatments or management recommendations
Respond ONLY with the JSON, without additional text

form.title: Differential Diagnosis
form.description: These are the ranked differential diagnoses generated from the radiology report. The AI has analyzed the report and provided three potential diagnoses with probabilities, descriptions, supporting features, and references.

fields.name: report
fields.label: Radiology Report
fields.help: Enter the radiology report for which you want differential diagnoses. Maximum 10,000 characters.
fields.placeholder: Example: Hazy opacity in the left mid lung field, possibly representing consolidation or infiltrate. No pleural effusion, pneumothorax or pneumoperitoneum.
